sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS rn, id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM fuzz_test WHERE value NOT LIKE '20%') SETTINGS max_block_size = 2;
SELECT rn, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS rn, value NOT LIKE '20%' AS condition FROM fuzz_test) GROUP BY rn HAVING condition = 1;
SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS rn, name FROM (SELECT * FROM fuzz_test WHERE created_at IS NULL OR created_at < now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) SETTINGS max_block_size = 3;
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT name, value FROM fuzz_test WHERE value > 15.0;
SELECT rowNumberInBlock(), id FROM (SELECT id FROM temp_test WHERE name NOT LIKE '%example%' OR name IS NULL) SETTINGS max_block_size = 5;
SELECT rn, AVG(value) FROM (SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS rn, value FROM fuzz_test) GROUP BY rn HAVING rn NOT LIKE '3';
SELECT rowNumberInBlock(), name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM fuzz_test WHERE id NOT LIKE CAST(value AS String) OR value IS NULL) ORDER BY name;
CREATE TABLE edge_test (id UInt32, age Int32 DEFAULT 0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO edge_test VALUES (1, -1), (2, CAST(NULL AS Int32)), (3, 2147483647);
SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS rn, id FROM (SELECT id FROM edge_test WHERE age NOT LIKE '') ORDER BY rn;
